name: Mo Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together softened butter, sugar, and brown sugar until well creamed.
2. Add eggs, vanilla extract, salt, and baking soda to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture a little at a time until all is incorporated. The batter will be stiff when adding the last 2 cups.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, leaving room for spreading.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
Note: Enjoy your delicious Mo Cookies!
